utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items explicitly. Each one provides full details: (1) property includes description, location, size, price, and features; (2) financing includes type, down payment, loan amount, rate, term, amortization, and estimated payment; (3) legal_services includes provider, cost, coverage, and duration; (4) moving_services includes service_level, cost, features, and duration; (5) setup_services includes package, monthly_cost, and one_time_fee; (6) total_budget includes full cost breakdown with all major figures. All items are complete and detailed according to the required format.
